title: IRR: A project has an initial investment of 100000 and cash...
summary: Evaluate or calculate the internal rate of return for project decision-making.
prompt: A project has an initial investment of $100,000 and cash inflows of $30,000 for 5 years. What is its IRR?

options.text: The IRR is calculated to be approximately 20% using a financial calculator
Payback ignores time value of money

solution: The IRR is calculated to be approximately 20% using a financial calculator.
